title: oxythece rigida
side_effects: Oxythece rigida can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing skin irritation, allergic reactions, and gastrointestinal problems in some individuals. In rare cases, excessive consumption of the plant may lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, and may interact with certain medications. If ingested in large quantities, oxythece rigida can also cause liver damage and kidney problems, which may be irreversible in severe cases. It is essential to consult a medical professional or a qualified herbalist before using oxythece rigida for any health purposes to avoid potential side effects.
